title: Schnorr Signatures
description: Schnorr signatures are Bitcoin's modern signature scheme introduced with Taproot and designed for linearity and simpler multisignature constructions. They improve composability for advanced scripts and protocols.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures
resources.notes: Canonical Schnorr signature specification for Bitcoin.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Defines how Schnorr keys and scripts are used in Taproot outputs.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.
